overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game (Mafia III) showing a character in a beige suit walking through a rainy 1960s New Orleans-inspired city. The character crosses intersections, passes historic Creole cottages with porches, commercial storefronts including a print shop and telephone booth, and ends at a gas station while navigating light traffic.

events.description: character begins crossing the wet crosswalk while vintage cars wait at the intersection
steps onto the wooden sidewalk leaving the asphalt crosswalk

agents.ego_description: walking across the wet crosswalk toward the residential side of the street, moving at a steady pace

notable_agents.action: woman with umbrella crossing the street in the opposite direction
vintage white car waiting at the stop sign

entered.detail: octagonal stop sign mounted on pole at the street corner
historic house with white porch columns and pink wooden siding
wooden power line pole with multiple transformers and wires

segments.scene_description: The character begins at a city corner and crosses a wet asphalt crosswalk on an overcast morning. A woman with an umbrella crosses in the opposite direction while vintage cars wait at the intersection. The character steps onto a wooden sidewalk and approaches a historic pink Creole cottage with white porch columns.

events.description: character transitions from walking to a jogging pace along the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: jogging along the sidewalk past historic houses with white porches and weathered wooden facades

notable_agents.action: man in t-shirt and jeans walking toward the camera on the sidewalk

entered.detail: door sealed with yellow caution tape with flowers placed at the entrance
red and silver vintage telephone booth with glass panels and TELEPHONE signage

segments.scene_description: The character jogs along a residential sidewalk lined with historic Creole cottages. A door sealed with yellow police tape and memorial flowers is visible on the right. The character passes a man walking in the opposite direction and approaches a red vintage telephone booth.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with storefronts and brick buildings

events.description: passing from residential wooden houses to commercial brick buildings with storefronts
pedestrian signal changes from green walk symbol to red hand

agents.ego_description: walking briskly past the telephone booth and print shop, approaching an intersection with a pedestrian signal

notable_agents.action: man sitting on wooden bench outside print shop reading a newspaper

entered.detail: brick building with illuminated PRINT SHOP sign and large windows
traffic signal pole showing green walk symbol then red hand
large brick building with arched entrance visible down the street

segments.scene_description: The character moves past a red telephone booth and continues along a commercial street with brick buildings. A man sits on a bench reading outside a print shop. The pedestrian signal ahead changes from green to red as the character approaches the next intersection, with a large church archway visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial intersection with gas station and newspaper stand

events.description: character crosses the street at the crosswalk passing a newspaper stand
white vintage truck narrowly misses character while driving through the crosswalk
character enters the gas station forecourt with red pumps

agents.ego_description: crossing the street while passing a newspaper stand, then narrowly avoiding a truck before entering a gas station

notable_agents.action: white vintage pickup truck driving through the crosswalk, nearly hitting the character

entered.detail: wooden newsstand with NEW BORDEAUX TRIBUNE signage displaying magazines and newspapers
Best Oil gas station with green signage and vintage red gas pumps

segments.scene_description: The character crosses a wide intersection, passing a wooden newspaper stand labeled New Bordeaux Tribune. A white vintage truck drives dangerously close through the crosswalk. The character continues into a gas station forecourt with red pumps and green Best Oil signage, concluding the sequence.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rainy city that transitions from a quiet residential neighborhood of historic cottages to a bustling commercial district and gas station. It begins at a city corner where the character crosses a wet asphalt intersection past vintage cars and a woman with an umbrella before stepping onto a wooden sidewalk beside a pink Creole cottage. As the character jogs further along the residential path, the scene shifts past a door sealed with police tape and memorial flowers toward a red vintage telephone booth. The environment then opens into a commercial street lined with brick buildings and a print shop, moving toward a distant church archway as the pedestrian signal changes. Finally, the camera follows the character across a wide intersection past a newspaper stand and a passing white truck, concluding as they enter a gas station forecourt with red pumps and green signage.
